title: Add bilingual tool/plugin descriptions with i18n support
goal: 모든 tool과 plugin에 한국어/영어 설명을 분리 제공한다. BaseTool에 description_ko/description_en 필드를 추가하고, /tools API에서 locale 파라미터에 따라 해당 언어 설명을 반환한다.

test_requirements.case: BaseTool has description_ko and description_en fields

test_requirements.expected: description field is Korean text only
description field is English text only

test_requirements.case: All tools have both ko and en descriptions
test_requirements.expected: no tool has empty description_ko or description_en
every tool dict has Korean description

test_requirements.case: Korean description contains no English words
test_requirements.expected: description_ko is pure Korean (allow technical terms)

test_requirements.case: English description contains no Korean characters

constraints: Keep existing description field for backward compatibility (defaults to description_en)
Add description_ko and description_en as class attributes on each tool
schema() method accepts optional locale parameter ('ko' or 'en', default 'en')
list_tools() in registry.py accepts optional locale parameter
Do not change tool behavior — only descriptions
Plugin descriptions are separate (not in scope — only tools)
test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
